topics.title: Vending Machine Key and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores the absurdity of celebrity culture and entertainment reporting before shifting to a humorous discussion regarding a staff member receiving a key to the office vending machine.

topics.title: Dougie the Puggy Book Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the plot and potential media adaptations of a book titled Dougie the Puggy, followed by a segment on dietary habits and a listener's comment about television coverage.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Ratings and Industry Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses the host's experience at a charity event where he was harassed by fans and reporters, followed by a review of Arbitron ratings that established his show as the most-listened-to satellite radio channel.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Ratings and Celebrity Health Update
topics.summary: The studio discusses the high listener numbers for Howard Stern channels on Sirius and XM, the health of singer Robert Goulet, and a shopping trip to a Yankees team store.

topics.title: Captain Janks' Career and Performance
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with Captain Janks, who discusses his prank phone calls, his work at a gas station, and his upcoming live performances.

topics.title: Retrospective of Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio reviews a collection of past prank calls, including a fake shark attack report on Fox News and a confrontation with Mother Angelica.

topics.title: Mother Angelica and Prediction Scenarios
topics.summary: The studio plays a recording of Mother Angelica's past phone calls before transitioning into a segment where the host provides statistical predictions on various topics including drug use, legal cases, and personal relationships.

topics.title: Artie's Nap and Sugar Crash
topics.summary: The studio monitors Artie as he falls into a deep sleep after consuming a large amount of sugar, leading to discussions about his health and the potential for comedic segments involving air horns or cymbals.

topics.title: Shaw Blades Musical Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts the band Shaw Blades as they perform classic covers and discuss their musical history, personal health, and career experiences.

topics.title: Musical Logic and Band Performance
topics.summary: The studio explores the connection between musical proficiency and mathematical logic while featuring a live performance by the band Shaw Blades.

topics.title: Musical Performance and Studio Mishaps
topics.summary: The studio hosts a live musical performance by Shaw-Blades before transitioning into a discussion regarding technical audio errors, health concerns for Artie, and the logistics of their upcoming contests.

topics.title: Arty's Health Concerns and Dietary Habits
topics.summary: The studio monitors Arty's blood sugar levels after he consumes a large amount of food and discusses his potential diagnosis of type 2 diabetes alongside plans for weight loss.

topics.title: Media Reports and Musical Discussions
topics.summary: The studio covers various segments including reports on Ellen DeGeneres, the debut of a new comedy pilot featuring Jackie Markling, an interview regarding media coverage of the show, and a debate over Prince's musical legacy.

topics.title: Film Soundtracks and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses the musical merits of various film soundtracks, including Purple Rain and Batman, before transitioning to news segments regarding a federal investigation into David Copperfield and reports on California wildfires.

topics.title: Wildfire Management and War Costs
topics.summary: The studio discusses the impact of federal budget cuts on wildfire suppression, the high costs of military operations in Iraq and Afghanistan, and a series of internal segments involving listener interactions and musical performances.

topics.title: News Segment Highlights
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including health statistics on obesity, the loss of Elvis memorabilia in California fires, upcoming comedy tour dates, and recent television moments.
